Cornucopia Heroic Challenge
Moon Whisper Amulet

Once in a while, the unit resurrects itself with 30% health after dying. After being resurrected, the unit increases the physical and magic armor for self and all allied units in a large radius by 65% for 4 sec. Each of the targets also has 3 random negative effects removed from them.

Requirements: 98-100
